title: ASCII Class ER Layered Planner
problem: Class and ER ASCII renderers duplicate the same layered relationship planning algorithm after the graph layout lane shipped chain and star support.

evidence.result: opened follow-on lane for behavior-preserving shared layered planner extraction
added a shared terminal-layout-only layered planner and routed classDiagram layered layout through it without public output drift
routed erDiagram layered layout through the shared planner while preserving ER-owned relationship semantics

continue_policy.notes: Run final merman-ascii package gates, update closeout evidence, and close the lane if no residual planner duplication remains. Keep dense/crossing topology support, color/style, flowchart direction work, and unrelated changes outside this lane.
